character.name: Chad
character.prompt: A 2D pixel art character of a large, muscular male with a very broad, powerful build. He has wide shoulders, a thick chest, and heavily defined arms with exaggerated muscle shapes for clear readability. His torso shows simple, stylized muscle definition, including chest, abs, and arms, using minimal shading. His waist is narrower compared to his upper body, creating a strong V-shaped silhouette. His head is slightly smaller in proportion to emphasize his size. His facial features are minimal, with a strong jawline and a simple, tough expression. His design uses bold shapes, limited colors, and clear contrast, optimized for low-resolution pixel art and animation.
